item.text: {"modelVerdict":"FAIL","summary":"Bounded evidence supports the recorded local test execution, the simulated Review Gate disclosure, and visible evidence boundaries. It contradicts claims of CI execution, completion of every external gate, and complete Phase-0 mission alignment because CI and multiple external gates were not run, while durable rejected-payment auditing has no implementation, assertion, or execution evidence.","claimAudits":[{"id":"TEST_EXECUTION","modelAssessment":"SUPPORTS","rationale":"The report records a specific Node test command, exit code 0, and two passing tests. The captured output identifies the same command and test cases, and the assertions cover tampered authentication, unverified payment rejection, and payment replay idempotency. This supports recorded local simulated execution, not production or external behavior.","citedEvidencePaths":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json","tests/invoiceflow.test.js",".controltower/governed-test-output.txt","docs/EVIDENCE_REPORT.md"],"counterEvidence":[],"missingEvidence":[],"recommendedNextAction":"Preserve the command output with its simulated/local boundary and continue citing the exact test source alongside it."},{"id":"CI_EXECUTION","modelAssessment":"CONTRADICTS","rationale":"The report explicitly marks CI as FAIL with no evidence, lists CI as NOT_RUN, and raises a high-severity NO_CI risk. The bounded evidence therefore affirmatively conflicts with recorded continuous-integration execution.","citedEvidencePaths":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json","docs/NOT_RUN_GATES.md"],"counterEvidence":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json records evidenceStatus.ci as FAIL with null evidence, lists CI under verification.notRun, and reports no CI configuration."],"missingEvidence":["No CI configuration, CI run record, job URL, log, or artifact is present in the allowed evidence."],"recommendedNextAction":"Add an approved minimal CI workflow that runs the focused test, then retain the resulting CI job record as bounded evidence."},{"id":"REVIEW_GATE","modelAssessment":"SUPPORTS","rationale":"The report and gate file consistently disclose an APPROVED decision limited to the simulated local fixture. Both identify the simulated reviewer, scope, allowed files, forbidden actions, timestamps, lack of identity verification, and the disclaimer that this is not enterprise identity verification.","citedEvidencePaths":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json",".controltower/review-gate.json"],"counterEvidence":[],"missingEvidence":[],"recommendedNextAction":"Keep the simulated and identity-unverified qualifications attached whenever the approval is presented."},{"id":"EVIDENCE_BOUNDARY","modelAssessment":"SUPPORTS","rationale":"The report visibly identifies simulated mode, records an executed passing local test, marks CI as FAIL, and lists unexecuted gates as NOT_RUN. The evidence report and traceability documents further distinguish locally covered behavior from absent implementation and external checks, while warning that NOT_RUN is not PASS.","citedEvidencePaths":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json","docs/EVIDENCE_REPORT.md","docs/TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md","docs/NOT_RUN_GATES.md"],"counterEvidence":[],"missingEvidence":[],"recommendedNextAction":"Retain the explicit PASS, FAIL, NOT_RUN, and SIMULATED labels and their stated scope boundaries in future report summaries."},{"id":"EXTERNAL_GATES","modelAssessment":"CONTRADICTS","rationale":"Multiple listed external verification gates explicitly remain NOT_RUN, including dependency, browser/accessibility, load/concurrency, real identity-provider, real payment-provider, and deployment checks. The report also lists CI and independent security review as not run.","citedEvidencePaths":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json","docs/NOT_RUN_GATES.md"],"counterEvidence":["docs/NOT_RUN_GATES.md marks every listed external or broader verification gate NOT_RUN.","CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json lists CI, browser/accessibility, load/concurrency, deployment, and independent security review under verification.notRun."],"missingEvidence":["No completion records are supplied for the gates marked NOT_RUN."],"recommendedNextAction":"Keep the completion claim false until each applicable gate has an approved execution record; continue identifying intentionally out-of-scope gates as NOT_RUN."},{"id":"MISSION_CHANGE_TEST_ALIGNMENT","modelAssessment":"CONTRADICTS","rationale":"The bounded source, assertions, and output support signed local sessions, rejection of tampered tokens and unverified payment events, idempotent payment replay, updated governance evidence, and a passing Node test. However, Phase-0 also requires a durable local audit record for every rejected payment attempt. The source throws on rejection without recording an audit entry, the test asserts only that an exception occurs, and the roadmap, traceability matrix, evidence report, and NOT_RUN record explicitly state that this criterion has no implementation, focused assertion, or command output. Therefore not every stated success criterion is semantically demonstrated.","citedEvidencePaths":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json","src/auth.js","src/payments.js","tests/invoiceflow.test.js",".controltower/governed-test-output.txt","docs/TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md","docs/EVIDENCE_REPORT.md","docs/TECH_DEBT_DELTA.md","plans/master-roadmap.md","docs/NOT_RUN_GATES.md",".controltower/review-gate.json"],"counterEvidence":["src/payments.js rejects invalid payment attempts by throwing but contains no durable audit-record write.","tests/invoiceflow.test.js checks that an unverified event throws but does not assert creation or durability of a rejection audit record.","docs/TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md marks durable rejected-payment auditing NOT_RUN with no implementation or focused verification.","docs/EVIDENCE_REPORT.md states that durable rejected-payment auditing has no implementation, assertion, or command output.","plans/master-roadmap.md records IFM-06 as NOT_RUN.","docs/NOT_RUN_GATES.md states that no persistence mechanism or focused assertion exists."],"missingEvidence":["A bounded durable audit implementation for every rejected payment path.","Focused assertions showing rejected attempts are recorded with required audit fields.","Recorded output demonstrating the audit record survives the defined durability boundary.","A traceability link connecting the criterion to that implementation, assertion, and output."],"recommendedNextAction":"Under a newly approved bounded persistence scope, implement durable rejected-attempt auditing and add focused tests covering each rejection path and the defined durability boundary."}],"nextSafeAction":"Do not claim CI, external-gate completion, or full Phase-0 success. Preserve the supported local test and simulated Review Gate evidence, and seek bounded approval before implementing and testing durable rejected-payment auditing."}
